_comment: MPBT Solaris RE symbol dictionary. Maps canonical names to their Ghidra-default binary identifiers. Apply canonical names in Ghidra via Edit → Rename Symbol to make cross-references readable.

Aries_RecvDispatch.role: Main recv loop; switch on ARIES packet type

Aries_PacketAlloc.role: Allocates outgoing packet; writes type + 12-byte header

Aries_PacketSetLen.role: Finalises header: fills payload_length field at offset 8

Aries_PacketParse.role: Recv-side parser: validates 12-byte header, extracts type + payload

Aries_Connect.role: Opens new TCP connection to addr (called on REDIRECT)

Aries_RawWrite.role: Sends raw bytes on active socket

g_aries_GameWorldConn.role: Pointer to secondary/game-world connection object; set after REDIRECT

g_aries_LoginBuf.role: Outgoing LOGIN packet data buffer (layout confirmed from Set*() exports)

Frame_VerifyCRC.role: 19-bit LFSR CRC validator for server→client inner frames

Frame_EncodeArg.role: Base-85 arg encoder: Frame_EncodeArg(n, value) emits n+1 bytes

Frame_DecodeArg.role: Base-85 arg decoder, symmetric to Frame_EncodeArg

Frame_ReadByte.role: Read one encoded byte from parse buffer: returns *ptr++ - 0x21

Frame_WriteCmdByte.role: Write command byte to send buffer: *ptr++ = param + 0x21

Frame_CopyString.role: Calls Frame_ReadString then null-terminates destination buffer

Lobby_RecvDispatch.role: Inner frame processor; calls seq pre-handler + g_lobby_DispatchTable

Lobby_SeqHandler.role: Seq-byte pre-handler; ACK path if decoded val > 42

Lobby_WelcomeGate.role: Accumulates recv bytes; strcmp to g_lobby_WelcomeStrMMW to unlock game loop

Lobby_OnWelcomeA.role: Called after welcome gate passes (path A — lobby UI init)

Lobby_OnWelcomeB.role: Called after welcome gate passes (path B)

Cmd3_Thunk.role: Dispatch table entry for cmd 3; calls Cmd3_SendCapabilities

Cmd7_ParseMenuDialog.role: Parses server cmd 7 menu dialog payload; renders numbered choice list

Cmd7_OnMenuPick.role: User picks menu item; sends Cmd7_SendReply(listId, item_data[k-1]+1)

Cmd7_OnMenuEsc.role: User presses ESC in menu; calls Cmd1d_Send

Cmd7_SendReply.role: Send client cmd 7 reply: startCmd('\a') + type1(listId) + type4(val)

Cmd1d_Send.role: Send cmd 0x1d cancel frame: byte(p1) + type1(p2) + type4(p3)

Cmd20_Thunk.role: Dispatch table entry for cmd 20; jumps to Cmd20_MouseHandler

Cmd20_MouseHandler.role: Cursor/mouse position handler for cmd 20 messages

Cmd26_ParseMechList.role: Parse cmd 26 mech list payload; populate g_cmd26_* arrays

MechWin_Create.role: Create 640×480 mech selection window; set graphics mode 0x13

MechWin_HighlightSlot.role: Highlight a mech row in selection window

MechWin_LookupMechName.role: Return mech name string from mech ID

MecFile_Load.role: Open mechdata\<name>.MEC, XOR-decrypt 552 bytes into param_1 struct, apply speed *2/3 post-transform

MecFile_Decrypt.role: XOR decrypt loop: 549 iters, advance-by-1 overlapping 32-bit PRNG XOR; param_2=byte_count

MecFile_Prng.role: PRNG step: uvar1=(state*0xF0F1+1); new_state=uvar1+rotl16(uvar1); returns new_state in EAX

MecFile_GetSeedId.role: Derive XOR seed from filename: last 4 chars before '.' in reverse order as LE uint32; stores to DAT_00479980

MecFile_GetStructPerSection.role: Return IS or armor for a body section (0-7) from tonnage lookup; case 7 returns 9 (head)

MecFile_BuildDisplayData.role: Fill mech display struct: copies 11 uint16 armor/speed fields from .MEC at 0x1A-0x2E, zero weapon slots, build ammo table

Map_LoadFile.role: Load IS.MAP / SOLARIS.MAP leading room table; count-prefixed variable records become fixed 0x1a-byte records, then trailing bytes go to Picture_ReadFromFile

Map_InitSpace.role: Load IS.MAP or SOLARIS.MAP depending on DAT_00472a54; builds sorted non-Solaris global room pointer list from IS.MAP

MapRecordCompareByFlags.role: qsort comparator for map record pointers: compare low flag byte at record+2, then case-insensitive room name at record+0x12

MapOpenInnerSphere.role: Server cmd 40 handler: reads context id, current room id, and value/cost, then opens the Inner Sphere map UI

MapOpenSolaris.role: Server cmd 43 handler: reads context id, current room id+1, and 26 Solaris counters, then opens the Solaris map UI

MapLocationListKeyHandler.role: Keyboard handler for the same-group map location list opened from the map UI

Map_SendTravelReply.role: Client cmd 10 sender: type1(contextId) + type4(selection); selection is selectedRoomId+1 or 0 for cancel

WorldScene_SendAction.role: Client cmd 5 sender for main scene action buttons: byte(actionType); Cmd4 option buttons pass their server-supplied type here

WorldScene_OptionHandler.role: Main scene action-button handler: Cmd4 option id 0x100 is local Help; ids 0x101..0x105 send cmd 5 with the server-supplied option type

WorldScene_MouseHandler.role: Main scene mouse-selection handler; fixed scene button offset 4 also sends cmd 5 action 4

WorldScene_KeyHandler.role: Main scene keyboard/button handler; button id 1 sends cmd 5 action 4, id 0x131 opens Options

WorldScene_LocationAction.role: Main scene location-icon handler; sends client cmd 23 with one byte selecting one of four location slots; values 0..3 cached target, 4..7 uncached target

Picture_ReadFromFile.role: Read generic picture/resource blob after the map room table

g_lobby_SeqHandlerPtr.role: Points to Lobby_SeqHandler; installed as pre-handler in Lobby_RecvDispatch

g_lobby_LastSeq.role: Stores most recently received client seq value (0–42)

g_lobby_WelcomeGateOpen.role: Set to 1 by Lobby_WelcomeGate when welcome string matches; unlocks main loop

g_lobby_WelcomeStrMMW.role: Literal: "\x1b?MMW Copyright Kesmai Corp. 1991" (normal Windows login path)

g_cmd7_ListIdTable.role: Per-list-id callback/state array; index [0x512] used by menu dialog

g_cmd26_TypeFlag.role: Set by Cmd26_ParseMechList to received typeFlag value

g_cmd26_MechIdArr.role: mech_id values array, indexed by entry i

g_cmd26_MechTypeArr.role: mech_type values array, indexed by entry i

g_cmd26_SlotArr.role: slot values array, indexed by entry i (primary copy)

g_cmd26_SlotArrAlt.role: slot values array, indexed by entry i (alternate copy)

g_cmd26_TypeStrArr.role: type_string array (e.g. "SDR-5V"), indexed by entry i

g_cmd26_VariantArr.role: variant string array (e.g. "Spider"), indexed by entry i

g_cmd26_NameArr.role: pilot name array; empty string triggers MechWin_LookupMechName fallback

g_mechWin_ShowExtButtons.role: Non-zero when typeFlag triggers extended button display

g_mechWin_HighlightIdx.role: Index of currently highlighted mech slot

Comm_DispatchDecodedPacket_v123.role: Dispatches decoded packet bytes through the active world/combat dispatch table; validates command index and minimum payload size before calling the handler

Comm_VerifyDecodedPacketCrc_v123.role: Verifies the decoded packet CRC using DAT_0047d05c to select the RPS vs combat seed, then strips the trailing CRC bytes

Comm_AccumulateEscapedPacketLine_v123.role: Accumulates inbound ESC-delimited packet lines into DAT_004dcd1c before decode/CRC verification

Comm_ProcessAccumulatedPacketLine_v123.role: Terminates the accumulated packet line, verifies/decodes it, then dispatches the decoded packet stream

Main_NetQueueTick_v123.role: Drains queued COMMEG payloads, dispatches mode packets, then ticks RPS state 3 or combat state 4

Main_ModePacketDispatch_v123.role: Classifies queued payloads after RPS start; routes later MMW/MMC handshakes or normal text-frame parsing

Main_InitialModeGate_v123.role: Initial MMW/MMC welcome gate; MMW enters RPS, MMC is only valid after RPS state is established

Main_ModeWelcomeClassify_v123.role: Returns 2 for ESC?MMW welcome, 3 for ESC?MMC welcome, 0 for non-handshake data

Main_SetModeName_v123.role: Argument 0 copies "Solaris RPS"; argument 1 copies "Solaris COMBAT"

World_HandleSceneInitPacket_v123.role: True outer Cmd4 world scene-init handler; resets scene UI state, installs callbacks, populates cached scene row, and rebuilds the scene window

World_ParseSceneInitCacheRow_v123.role: Inner Cmd4 cache-row parser inside World_HandleSceneInitPacket_v123; reads current scene and optional travel-slot payload into the cached scene tables

World_HandleInfoPanelPacket_v123.role: World-mode info panel packet handler; opens a modal/list-style panel from decoded packet content

World_HandleDetailPanelPacket_v123.role: World-mode detail panel packet handler; reads a detail/follow-up payload and opens the corresponding UI panel

World_HandleSceneActionResponsePacket_v1.role: World-mode scene-action response family handler for the non-travel Cmd5 scene action flow

Combat_InitMode_v123.role: Combat-mode initializer after MMC welcome; tears down RPS UI, loads scenes.dat, resets combat globals

Combat_Tick_v123.role: Per-frame combat tick; runs combat update and calls combat music selector when music is enabled

Audio_CombatMusicSelect_v123.role: Chooses requested combat music state from target distance/visibility/advantage, then calls Audio_RequestMusicState_v123

Audio_RequestMusicState_v123.role: Maps external music request ids to internal state ids; request 10 maps to internal state 6

Audio_TickMusicState_v123.role: Applies pending KSND/Miles music state transitions and invokes selected state callback

g_comm_ActivePacketDispatchTable_v123.role: Pointer to the currently active v1.23 packet dispatch table; set by Main_SetModeName_v123 to DAT_00478070 or DAT_004782d8

g_comm_ActivePacketDispatchCount_v123.role: Entry count for g_comm_ActivePacketDispatchTable_v123; 0x4d in world mode and 0x52 in combat mode

g_packetDispatchTable_World_v123.role: World-mode packet dispatch table; 8-byte rows of { minimum payload bytes after command byte, handler }

g_packetDispatchTable_Combat_v123.role: Combat-mode packet dispatch table; 8-byte rows of { minimum payload bytes after command byte, handler }

g_modeState_v123.role: Mode state: 3 = Solaris RPS tick, 4 = Solaris COMBAT tick

g_modeRpsActive_v123.role: Set after the MMW/RPS welcome path starts

g_musicStateRequested_v123.role: Pending internal music state id requested by Audio_RequestMusicState_v123

g_musicStateNames_v123.role: Pointer table of 21 music-state labels; index 6 is "Transition to combat - even"

MPBTWIN.EXE v1.29._comment: Generated from C:/MPBT/mpbt-client/scripts/research retail_* catalogs and cross-checked against RESEARCH.md notes. Addresses are retail v1.29 image offsets in mpbtwin.exe.

World_OpenTextSelectionModalWindow_v129.role: Tears down the current world root UI and opens the shared modal shell used by numbered text-selection pages.

World_OpenNumberedTextSelectionDialog_v1.role: Builds the numbered text-selection dialog from the shared choice-string table.

World_NumberedTextSelectionDialog_Handle.role: Handles numeric hotkeys for the older numbered text-selection dialog.

Shell_CreateQueuedInboundLineBuffer_v129.role: Allocates an owned retail shell-line buffer and copies one inbound text line into it.

Shell_FreeQueuedInboundLineBuffer_v129.role: Frees an owned retail shell-line buffer descriptor and its copied text payload.

Shell_StackCleanupReturnStub_v129.role: Orphaned shell-region stack-cleanup epilogue stub that only pops `ebx`, drops `0x54` stack bytes, and returns.

caseD_7f1.role: Retail v1.29 custom-named function imported from the saved Ghidra function catalog

caseD_206.role: Retail v1.29 custom-named function imported from the saved Ghidra function catalog

Shell_SendCloseCommandsToVisibleThreadWi.role: Broadcasts the retail auxiliary-window close commands to each visible non-main window on the current UI thread.
Sends the retail close command pair to one visible non-main auxiliary window on the shell UI thread.

Shell_HandleSocketWindowCreationFailure_.role: Logs the fatal frontend socket-window creation failure and tears down the main shell window.

Shell_RunFrontendMain_v129.role: Main retail frontend entry path that initializes the client windowing/network stack, runs the shell message loop, and shuts down on exit.

Shell_CreateMainWindow_v129.role: Registers the retail MPBattleTech window class and creates the hidden main shell window.

Shell_BuildExecutableDirectoryPath_v129.role: Builds the retail executable directory path from the current module filename.

Shell_ServiceNetworkStateLoop_v129.role: Polls queued shell/network frames, dispatches them through the shell state handlers, and advances the active frontend state tick.

Shell_FlushOutboundCommandBuffer_v129.role: Finalizes and sends the current outbound shell command buffer when it contains a complete command frame.

Shell_ValidateAndDispatchEscCommandBuffe.role: Finalizes the current ESC-delimited shell command buffer, verifies it, and dispatches the validated command stream.

Shell_AppendEscDelimitedStreamChunk_v129.role: Appends raw shell stream bytes into the active line buffer, flushing the current line whenever an escape delimiter arrives.

Shell_ResetHeartbeatState_v129.role: Resets the retail shell heartbeat bookkeeping during frontend state transitions.

Shell_ResetFrontendTransientState_v129.role: Resets transient shell/frontend protocol, marquee, and input state before entering a fresh frontend scene.

System_GetCentisecondTickCount_v129.role: Returns the retail monotonic tick count in centiseconds.

Shell_EnterDropScene_v129.role: Clears the active shell/world UI and enters the retail DROP scene card flow from SCENES.DAT.

Combat_FreeVisualResourcesAndLocationMap.role: Releases the currently loaded combat visual resource tables and cached world location map before combat visuals are rebuilt.

Shell_RunWorldStateTick_v129.role: Runs the retail shell state-3 world/frontend tick after banner handling finishes.

Shell_RunCombatStateTick_v129.role: Runs the retail shell state-4 combat tick by polling input and stepping the combat main loop.

Shell_HandlePostVersionBannerLine_v129.role: Handles inbound shell/banner lines after the frontend has already entered the active post-version state machine.

Shell_HandlePreVersionBannerLine_v129.role: Handles inbound shell/banner lines during the retail pre-version negotiation phase.

World_Cmd35_RequestClientExit_v129.role: Requests immediate client shutdown from the world command stream.

Shell_ClearNumLockToggleState_v129.role: Consumes the retail Num Lock toggle edge so world/combat keyboard handling does not inherit a stale toggle bit.

System_ReportBterrorEvent_v129.role: Writes one formatted event to `bterror.log`, optionally surfaces it immediately, and can latch the shared retail error flags.

Shell_ClassifyBannerLine_v129.role: Classifies an incoming retail shell line as one of the known introductory copyright/banner lines.

Shell_InitializeFrontendResourcesAndAudi.role: Performs the one-shot retail frontend bootstrap for palettes, fonts, picture archives, and audio startup.

Shell_ShutdownFrontendResourcesAndAudio_.role: Tears down the retail frontend shell resources, fonts, idle timer, and audio layer on exit.

Shell_OpenTimedArchiveSlideshow_v129.role: Begins a timed fullscreen archive slideshow session from a tagged archive name and a delay/tag script string.

Shell_CloseTimedArchiveSlideshow_v129.role: Stops the active timed archive slideshow, restores the frontend display, and clears the slideshow session globals.

Shell_TickTimedArchiveSlideshow_v129.role: Advances one timed archive slideshow step, loads the next bitmap tag, presents it, and rearms the slideshow timer.

Shell_InitializeFrontendAudio_v129.role: Initializes the retail frontend sound driver, volumes, and LASR sound support flags from the saved shell audio configuration bits.

Shell_ShutdownFrontendAudio_v129.role: Shuts down the retail frontend sound driver and clears the associated sound-state flags.

System_OpenNoGameCpuCheckDialog_v129.role: Opens the frontend NoGameCPUCheck override dialog when the current CPU fails the retail game-speed threshold.

System_NoGameCpuCheckDialogProc_v129.role: Dialog procedure for the retail NoGameCPUCheck override prompt.

Mech_SeedRecordCipherFromFilenameSuffix_.role: Seeds the retail mech-record XOR stream from the last four characters of the mechdata filename stem.

Mech_XorRecordBufferWithCipherStream_v12.role: XOR-decodes a mechdata record buffer byte-by-byte using the rolling filename-seeded retail cipher stream.

Mech_NextRecordCipherWord_v129.role: Advances the retail mech-record XOR generator and returns the next stream word derived from the filename-suffix seed.

Combat_ResetPresentationStateSeedGuard_v.role: Clears the one-shot guard that allows the retail presentation-state XOR seed to be refreshed.

Combat_CapturePresentationStateSeedTick_.role: Captures the current tick count as the retail presentation-state XOR seed when the guard is open.

Combat_AllocateActorPresentationStateTab.role: Allocates the retail eight-slot actor presentation state table and refreshes its companion heap-noise buffer.

Combat_FreeActorPresentationStateTable_v.role: Frees the active retail actor presentation state table and clears its allocation flag.

Combat_DecodePresentationStateGlobals_v1.role: XOR-decodes the shared retail combat presentation globals with the previously captured presentation seed.

Combat_InitializeActorPresentationStateT.role: Zeroes and seeds the retail actor presentation state table, then reapplies XOR encoding to the shared presentation globals.

Combat_SendSpeechOutText_v129.role: Sends one combat speech-out text payload through the retail outbound shell buffer.

Combat_DecodeTerrainProjectionOutlinePoi.role: Decodes the capped local-actor terrain projection outline point list used by the retail tactical projection overlay.

Combat_Cmd72_InitLocalActor_v129.role: Initializes the local combat scene / self actor.

Combat_DecodeLocalActorMechState_v129.role: Decodes the cmd72 local-actor mech state block, including the backing mech record, component state tables, and trailing label string.

Combat_Cmd63_ResultSceneInit_v129.role: Initializes the combat result scene / post-match surface.

Combat_Cmd74_DisplayStatusMessage_v129.role: Displays combat status / HUD message text.

Combat_IsEjectConfirmPending_v129.role: Returns whether the retail local eject flow is waiting for its confirming hotkey press.

Combat_ClearPendingEjectConfirm_v129.role: Cancels a pending local eject confirmation and redraws the retail eject-status HUD strip.

Combat_AdvanceEjectConfirmState_v129.role: Advances the retail two-step local eject confirmation state and starts the warning/audio phase on the second press.

Combat_HandlePresentationHotkey_v129.role: Handles combat-scene presentation hotkeys, including detail toggles, voice-panel mode changes, and other in-scene UI shortcuts.

Combat_ResetPresentationStateAndLoadVisu.role: Resets the retail combat presentation state and loads the saved visual-detail / overlay option bits into the active runtime flags.

Combat_SetActiveTerrainPaletteTable_v129.role: Installs the active terrain palette table for the combat scene, copying it into the runtime palette buffer and marking every entry dirty.

Combat_InitializeBattlefieldVisualState_.role: Initializes the battlefield-facing visual runtime after combat resources are loaded, including terrain palette state, scenery, backdrop layers, and projectile effect slots.

Combat_ApplyActiveTerrainPaletteForDurat.role: Applies the active combat terrain palette working copy immediately and arms a short restore deadline.

Combat_DrawOverlayTextLine_v129.role: Draws one clipped text line onto the main combat overlay surface.

Combat_RenderActorWorldMarkers_v129.role: Draws the retail world-screen actor marker overlays for the local actor and every active remote mech.

Combat_RenderTacticalRadarPanel_v129.role: Draws the fixed-size retail tactical radar panel, including terrain projection, contact blips, range readout, and facing cues.

Combat_BuildTacticalRadarContactMarker_v.role: Builds the small normalized contact-marker polygon used by the retail tactical radar panel.

Combat_DrawHeadingTapeHud_v129.role: Draws the stacked retail heading-tape HUD for the local chassis and upper-body headings.

Combat_MainLoop_v129.role: Top-level retail combat loop / scene tick anchor.

Combat_SendEjectCommandAfterCue_v129.role: Flushes the retail local eject opcode once the armed warning cue finishes playing.

Combat_DrawFrameRateOverlay_v129.role: Updates the rolling retail framerate sample and draws the FPS overlay string on the combat frame.

Combat_DrawCombatHelpOverlay_v129.role: Draws the retail combat help overlay bitmap onto the main combat frame when the help latch is active.

Combat_HasAnyWeaponSlotEnabledByBankFilt.role: Returns whether the current retail weapon-bank filter leaves any local weapon slot enabled.

Combat_IsWeaponSlotEnabledByBankFilter_v.role: Returns whether one local weapon slot is enabled by the active retail weapon-bank filter state.

Combat_DoesWeaponSlotBankFilterStateChan.role: Returns whether one local weapon slot would change enabled/highlight state under the pending retail bank filter.

Combat_SetWeaponBankFilterState_v129.role: Applies one retail weapon-bank filter selection and updates the slot highlight rectangles whose filter eligibility changed.

Combat_ToggleStickyViewMode_v129.role: Toggles the retail sticky-view mode latch used by the local aim and weapon-filter controls.

Combat_ProcessWeaponBankFilterInput_v129.role: Processes the local directional weapon-bank filter inputs and updates the derived retail filter selection state.

Combat_UpdateUpperBodyAimCueAudio_v129.role: Updates the local upper-body aim cue audio from the torso-yaw, pitch, and recenter activity timers.

Combat_ProcessMouseUpperBodyAimInput_v12.role: Reads mouse displacement and feeds the local torso-yaw and upper-body pitch accumulators.

Combat_SelectNextTrackedActor_v129.role: Cycles the tracked-actor selection to the next eligible retail contact for the current presentation mode.

Combat_UpdateCombatStartCountdownHud_v12.role: Updates the retail combat-start countdown HUD readout and releases the local actor when the countdown expires.

Combat_DrawTrackedActorScreenBracket_v12.role: Draws the retail screen-space bracket around the currently tracked actor and, when enabled, its adjacent info label.

Combat_DrawTrackedActorInfoLabel_v129.role: Draws the tracked actor's three-line retail info label beside a world marker or screen bracket.

Combat_DrawWeaponAimCursor_v129.role: Updates the live combat aim-cursor screen position and draws the retail cursor bitmap when the current weapon filter leaves a local slot enabled.

Combat_FreeVoiceAndEffectPresentationRes.role: Frees the retail voice HUD surface and active-effect presentation pools during combat/result teardown.

Combat_TickRemoteActorPresentationState_.role: Advances one remote actor's presentation state and rebuilds the render matrices used by the combat overlay passes.

Combat_ComputeVelocityMagnitude3_v129.role: Returns the magnitude of a 3-axis retail velocity vector.

Combat_ProcessLocalMechContact_v129.role: Processes local mech contact / ground interaction.

Combat_ResolveLandingOrGroundContact_v12.role: Resolves landing or general ground-contact state.

Combat_IntegrateActorMotion_v129.role: Integrates motion state into actor position / velocity fields.

Combat_UpdateActorPreviewSectionStatusCo.role: Updates the combat actor preview model's per-section status colors from the current armor and internal structure values.

Combat_SendLocalWeaponEffectUpdate_v129.role: Packages one local weapon-fire/effect update from the computed fire solution and forwards it to the retail outbound combat stream.

Combat_DrawOffscreenActorEdgeMarkers_v12.role: Draws the retail off-screen actor edge markers around the combat frame for active remote contacts.

Combat_DrawOffscreenActorEdgeMarker_v129.role: Draws one small directional off-screen actor marker glyph on the combat frame edge.

Combat_DrawTacticalRadarRangeRings_v129.role: Draws the concentric tactical-radar range rings for the current retail radar range step.

Combat_FillRectWithRandomInterferenceRun.role: Paints randomized opaque span runs into a combat panel rect to create the retail interference/static effect.

Combat_ShowTimedStatusMessage_v129.role: Latches one timed combat status message into the shared HUD buffer and mirrors it into the capture log when logging is active.

Combat_MapActorColorCodeToPaletteIndex_v.role: Maps a retail actor color code to the fixed palette index used by combat markers, radar blips, and status text.

Combat_SendCmd19Action_v129.role: Queues outbound combat cmd19 and flushes it immediately.

Combat_ResetLocalMotionAndRefreshAnimati.role: Retail v1.29 custom-named function imported from the saved Ghidra function catalog

Combat_GetActorPanelInterferenceLevel_v1.role: Returns the current actor-panel interference level from the encoded local-actor combat state.

Combat_ArmDeferredCollapseWhileAirborne_.role: Arms deferred collapse while the actor is still airborne.

Combat_InitializeVisualResourcesAndHudSt.role: Initializes the retail combat visual resources, fonts, and baseline HUD state before the main loop enters steady-state rendering.

System_ClickAolPaletteOkButton_v129.role: Child-window callback that finds the AOL palette dialog's `OK` button and simulates the double-click needed to dismiss it.

System_StartAolPaletteWatcherTimer_v129.role: Starts the retail AOL palette watcher timer when an AOL Frame25 host window is present.

System_StopAolPaletteWatcherTimer_v129.role: Cancels the retail AOL palette watcher timer on the active shell host window.

System_TickAolPaletteWatcher_v129.role: Ticks the retail AOL palette watcher, polling the palette window and dispatching the OK-button callback when needed.

Combat_InitializeIdentityByteLookupTable.role: Resets the shared combat byte lookup table to the identity mapping `0..255`.

Combat_InterpolateClippedPolygonVertexAt.role: Interpolates the payload fields for one newly clipped polygon vertex after the clip-plane intersection coordinates are solved.

Combat_ComputeClipPlaneIntersectionCoord.role: Solves the two varying coordinates where a polygon edge intersects one homogeneous combat view-volume clip plane.

Combat_ClipPolygonToViewVolume_v129.role: Clips a homogeneous polygon vertex list against the retail combat view volume and emits the surviving scratch vertex list.

Combat_ProjectWorldPointToScreenVertex_v.role: Projects one transformed combat world point into the shared six-word screen-vertex record used by overlays and effect renderers.

Combat_ProjectClippedPolygonToTexturedRe.role: Projects a clipped polygon into the linked textured-render vertex buffer used by the retail textured polygon rasterizer.

Combat_ComputeVisibleAttachmentViewVaria.role: Computes the visible attachment view-variant index from the current transformed attachment basis.

Combat_RenderLitClippedPolygon_v129.role: Clips, lights, projects, and rasterizes one uniformly shaded polygon through the retail flat-polygon path.

Combat_RenderTexturedPolygonGroup_v129.role: Expands, clips, projects, and rasterizes one textured polygon group from a retail mesh record.

Combat_ToggleInvertedMouseThrottle_v129.role: Toggles the retail inverted-mouse-throttle latch used by the mouse throttle zone.

Combat_PollJoystickAxisState_v129.role: Refreshes the cached retail joystick axis state when the current device and capability flags permit it.

Combat_GetMouseControlZoneConfig_v129.role: Returns the retail mouse-control zone descriptor for turn, aim, and related control surfaces.

Combat_HasConfiguredJoystickAxisModes_v1.role: Returns whether any of the retail joystick axis-control channels currently has an active mode assignment.

Combat_PlayWeaponTypeFireCue_v129.role: Plays the retail fire audio cue associated with a weapon type.
